item.dc:creator: RorytheRedKing

item.title: My personal war
item.description:
I am a journalist of Ukrainian tv channel “Espreso” turned Territorial Defense Fighter in Kyiv region. More than eight years ago I covered events of Revolution of Dignity. Then I’ve documented russian invasion of our eastern regions and war over there. But when war criminals and occupants knocked on my door, I’ve decided to act differently.
Thanks a lot to everyone, who supports Ukrainians in these trying times.
Moment of tranquility
War isn’t just about fighting. It’s about walking a lot(ARMA III reference) and a metric shit ton of digging
On my watch
Not so much
That’s 82 mm mortar sent by “liberators”
Going on a trip
Defending a small village near Kyiv
Mua in thermal optics
Thanks a lot for your attention. Please keep supporting Ukraine. We’re still here, we’re still fighting.
item.dc:creator: EliBLifter

item.title: Ever seen an Unheated Tanzanite?
item.description: New natural color (Unheated) Tanzanite from Tanzania. Steve Moriarty just finished faceting this 28.36ct gem for our Live Streaming Gem Show that happens tonight at 7:05PM (Chicago Time) on our YouTube channel here: https://youtu.be/6HpVnp0xBNc Stop by to see this and many other amazing rare gemstones!
item.dc:creator: MoreGems

item.title: Most of these people are still alive... and they vote.
item.description: 1960 - Six-year-old Ruby Bridges (not pictured) went to a white school. The people in this picture thought it was acceptable to badger and harass a small child for attending school. Ruby is still alive and 67 years old today. Many of the people in this picture are also alive and they vote. We out number them, even in many "red" states, but that only matters if we vote.
item.dc:creator: GandolfFood

item.title: Hump Day, Dump Day
item.dc:creator: keldry27

item.title: I was homeless at 17. Here is me outside of the car I called home, and my story.
item.description:
So, this isn’t my main account. I don’t share much about myself on that account, for I am an artist and why would I? Also, I know Imgur has a no selfies rule, so hopefully I’m not angering anyone too much. But, I’ve had a crazy, eventful life for someone my age. I was born in South Africa, grew up in the Caribbean and Hawaii, and lived on a trust fund that was inherited from my mother’s shady German grandfather, until she spent it completely when I was 17. We left our high rise apartment in haste, leaving everything behind except for a bag of belongings, a suitcase and our car. Turns out, my family hadn’t been paying the rent for the past while. My family spent the trust fund that was meant to last way longer than it did, on plastic surgery, travel, material goods and risky investments. I was in and out of the system growing up, for a variety of reasons. I was taken away from my mentally unstable mother permanently when I was 5 months away from turning 18. When I was homeless, I was out of school. I had been “homeschooled” for 4 years, but in reality, my education level is probably around a 12 year old’s. In foster care, I had attended my senior year at a public school, and somehow managed decent ish grades. Even though we had a nice house before, my mom was severely mentally unstable and thus I was in and out of state care. At 17, I was placed in a foster home, and had no where to go after I graduated. I moved in with my then boyfriend, now fiancé. We still live together and I am 21 now. These are some pictures from my life back when I was homeless. We showered at camp grounds and beach parks. We washed our clothes in campground sinks, or when we had some cash to spare, a laundromat. People still clocked that we were homeless though, because we hung out in the same areas, and despite my efforts in keeping clean, I had wild hair, and we looked a bit rugged I guess. I remember people would sometimes offer me food when they’d see me in the Internet cafe, and I’d refuse, because I didn’t truly trust people. I guess I had become a bit of a common fixture in the Internet cafe, for I was terminally online like most teenagers are. My mother had a few odd jobs, but eventually began stripping at a local club, which is when she got into hard drug abuse in addition to already present alcoholism. Sometimes, we went hungry. Sometimes, she bought food with cash she earned during the night. Sometimes, she spent it on drugs and drink. I’ve had a crazy life. I felt like venting today. I feel that it’s so weird to try to explain the kind of life I’ve lived to people. It’s not often you tell someone you’ve walked in the streets of Paris and Tokyo and also were homeless without them raising some eyebrows. I have a lot of stories to tell. The time was rough but my surroundings were beautiful, and I appreciate my experience of being homeless was full of beauty around me, even though I had nothing materialistically. Nowadays, I’m rather boring. I work full time, and I like to paint and draw my characters. I like to cook, and go exploring sometimes but work takes up quite a bit of my life now. Sometimes, I miss the freedom I felt being such a wild child. Edit:added detail :)
I had an old phone and laptop which I used with internet at cafes or just simply took pictures with.
The cat I befriended, looking at me. There some guy’s makeshift shack in the back. The man who showed me where the turtles are
Here I am at that age with a cat I befriended. He kept rubbing against me when I was sitting down, and coming close.
My dog in our car “home”
A place where I’d often sit and sing to myself.
Remember when I mentioned that gentleman who showed me where the turtles were? Well, here is a photo I took of the spot. He was right.
Again, turtle. I actually used to have a video of me riding a turtle while swimming my mother took of me, which is highly illegal but I didn’t know and it was a different kind of lifestyle I lived. Please don’t get too mad at me for mentioning that tidbit.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount

item.title: American Taliban
item.description: Republicans love to bitch about Hunter while surreptitiously working to turn America into an christian fascist state. Imagine being so horrible than terrorist taliban has more progressive views than you on this issue. https://www.rawstory.com/marjorie-taylor-2657101937/ https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/taliban-release-decree-saying-women-must-consent-marriage-2021-12-03/ #republicansareterriblepeople
item.dc:creator: BaronWolfgangVonWolfhausen

item.title: A pose a day: A challenger emerges
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. Now you may be thinking... You've already shared these? But this is an example of how you can merge my stock images together to set a scene. :) These are two separate images put together (also going on my new business card)! Hope it helps you somehow! Happy drawing!
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: Day 313: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me

item.title: Bucha murderers are being identified
item.description:
Work is underway to identify all soldiers that are part of Unit 51460 of the 64th Motor Rifle Brigade from Khabarovsk (near Vladivostok).
The unit allegedly played a leading role in the Bucha Massacre.
Its commander is Omurbekov Azatbek Asanbekovich.
Spread it far and wide!
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant
